title: asterolasia correifolia var. mollis
intro: Asterolasia correifolia var. mollis is a plant species that belongs to the Rutaceae family, commonly known as the citrus family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant's leaves and roots are rich in essential oils and flavonoids, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, offering various health benefits including reducing fever and relieving sore throats. In herbal preparations, Asterolasia correifolia var. mollis is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to leverage its medicinal properties.
